title: Foundational Engineer
summary: We are an AI research lab working vertically on industrial technology. We are building the models that will define industrial autonomy. As a Foundational Engineer, you will own the territory where intelligence meets the physical world, mapping deep constraints and transforming raw operational curiosity into robust architectural systems.

sections.title: Expect to focus on
bullets: Deconstruct complex industrial systems and translate them into concrete product specifications for our AI.
Rapidly prototype applied AI solutions using state-of-the-art models and agentic workflows.
Own the primary architecture for vertical autonomy and intelligence logic.
Research and implement patterns that allow AI to safely and effectively interact with physical infrastructure.
Architect scalable system blueprints that push the boundaries of what is possible in industrial settings.

sections.title: You may be a good fit if you
bullets: Demonstrated capability of architecting and solving ambiguous technical problems from absolute zero.
Deep technical curiosity and a drive to understand how things work at a fundamental level.
High fluency in Python and experience with modern AI orchestration frameworks.
A strong appetite for deep research and the ability to parse complex technical documentation.
Strong operational flexibility; you adapt to new evidence quickly and thrive on ambiguity.

sections.title: InquisLab is for you if
bullets: You want supreme autonomy over the direction of AI research in the industrial vertical.
You are driven by the question of what curiosity can do for humanity when applied to our most critical systems.
You want to be an engineering pillar in a lab that values deep technical work and rapid iteration.

applyBody:
Please share:

1. Technical links you're proud of (GitHub, personal website, or a deployed project).
2. A concise explanation of the most ambiguous technical problem you've recently solved.
3. Why you are interested in InquisLab.

No cover letters required.

title: Product Engineer
summary: We are building the vertical layer for industrial autonomy. As a Product Engineer at InquisLab, you will own the end-to-end execution of our flagship interfaces, turning raw industrial research into hyper-reliable production systems that feel alive and intuitive.

sections.title: Expect to focus on
bullets: Architect and build our core interfaces, ensuring a seamless connection between AI research and human operators.
Wire up and scale pipelines that turn complex research outputs into high-fidelity, actionable tools.
Own the zero-to-one implementation of our vertical technology stack.
Collaborate natively with researchers to transition complex industrial logic into stable, performant code.
Interface with users to iterate aggressively, prioritizing the 'feel' and reliability of the system.

sections.title: You may be a good fit if you
bullets: High fluency in modern web frameworks (React/Next.js) and a deep appreciation for clean code.
A proven track record of shipping end-to-end products that reflect a deep understanding of user needs.
Strong product intuition and a curious mind that constantly seeks to improve the user experience.
The instinct to iterate rapidly and thrive in a high-velocity, research-driven environment.
A zero-ego approach to problem solving and a passion for building things that matter.

sections.title: InquisLab is for you if
bullets: You want to build the front-line interfaces for the world's most critical physical infrastructure.
You are a foundational member of a lab that values both technical excellence and creative execution.
You are curious about the intersection of high-end design and heavy industrial technology.

applyBody:
Please share:

1. Technical links you're proud of (GitHub, personal website, or a deployed project).
2. A brief overview of an end-to-end product feature you have shipped.
3. Why you are interested in InquisLab.

No cover letters required.

title: Growth Lead
summary: We are an AI research lab introducing a new category of technology to traditional industries. As the Growth Lead, you will orchestrate our engine for impact. You will extract deep insights from the vertical world, build targeted distribution channels, and scale our initial presence from absolute zero.

sections.title: Expect to focus on
bullets: Extract and document deep insights directly from the industrial vertical.
Architect precise growth strategies for reaching decision-makers in heavy industry.
Write deeply-researched, high-signal narratives that communicate our research and its impact.
Translate complex engineering advancements into highly accessible and compelling positioning.
Own the lifecycle of our growth experiments, from initial hypothesis to scaled execution.

sections.title: You may be a good fit if you
bullets: You are an exceptional, concise writer who can tell a story that resonates with technical and industrial audiences.
Deep natural curiosity for complex industrial systems and the people who run them.
High proficiency in growth experimentation and the ability to scale what works.
An analytical approach to iterating on messaging and a high threshold for ambiguity.
A passion for category creation and a drive to see curiosity reshape industries.

sections.title: InquisLab is for you if
bullets: You want to build the growth engine of a technical lab from the ground up.
You are curious about how to bring cutting-edge AI research to the world's most traditional categories.
You want to work at the intersection of deep tech and human storytelling.

applyBody:
Please share:

1. A portfolio piece, writing sample, or metric-backed summary of a project you led.
2. What excites you about the intersection of curiosity and industrial technology.
3. Why you are interested in InquisLab.

No cover letters required.

title: Creative Director / Video
summary: To reshape an industry, you must show them a new world. As the Creative Director of Video, you will own the visual and narrative output of our lab. You will distill deep technical research into compelling visual stories that command attention and spark curiosity.

sections.title: Expect to focus on
bullets: Direct and produce high-impact visual stories that translate our research's industrial impact.
Leverage modern AI tooling to maintain a high-fidelity, research-driven production cadence.
Own and scale our primary visual distribution channels, driving a consistent narrative.
Experiment with visual formats to find the most effective ways to communicate complex ideas.
Collaborate with researchers to capture the essence of our work in aesthetic, dynamic formats.

sections.title: You may be a good fit if you
bullets: A demonstrable portfolio of high-performing visual content that tells a complex story simply.
Expertise with both traditional production and cutting-edge generative AI tools.
An exceptional intuition for visual storytelling and a deep sense of aesthetic curiosity.
The ability to aggressively ship functional v1s and iterate based on the narrative needs of the lab.
A passion for using video as a tool to explore and communicate new frontiers.

sections.title: InquisLab is for you if
bullets: You want total creative ownership over the visual brand of an emergent AI research lab.
You are curious about framing systems and technologies that are currently undocumented.
You want to build the internal creative studio of a scaling industry leader.

applyBody:
Please share:

1. Direct links to the highest-performing or best-produced videos you have created.
2. A short breakdown of your visual production tooling stack.
3. Why you are interested in InquisLab.

No cover letters required.
